case_title: DENZEL ERNESTO CALERO GRIJALVA VS. XIU PING CUI

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,000.00 FILED BY CALERO GRIJALVA, DENZEL ERNESTO AS TO DEFENDANT CUI, XIU PING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-22-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF NO SERVICE FEE SERVED AUG-25-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CUI, XIU PING

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-22-2025 - CONTINUED FOR MANDARIN & SPANISH INTERPRETERS FOR DEFENDANT AND PLAINTIFF RESPECTIVELY TO OCT-09-2025 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506 BY JUDGE PRO TEM LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF DENZEL ERNESTO CALERO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT XIU PING CUI IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER FOR CONTINUANCE RE: SPANISH AND MANDARIN INTERPRETERS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-09-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-09-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. PLAINTIFF DENZEL ERNESTO CALERO GRIJALVA APPEARED, WITH ASSISTANCE FROM SPANISH INTERPRETER ELVA REYES ESPINOSA. DEFENDANT XIU PING CUI APPEARED, WITH ASSISTANCE FROM MANDARIN INTERPRETER HSIN JU CHANG. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE JOHN TRUE, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CALERO GRIJALVA, DENZEL ERNESTO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CUI, XIU PING $10,551.45 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,626.45 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CUI, XIU PING
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-09-2025 - JUDGMENT.
